License information for Sazanami Mincho font, declaring it as Public Domain with no warranty.

# Purpose
The document describes the licensing terms for font data, documents, and scripts included in an archive. It states that all contents are provided as Public Domain, meaning they are free to use, modify, convert, integrate, and redistribute. However, due to legal constraints in Japan, the authors listed in the `AUTHORS` file declare that they will not exercise their copyright, effectively making the contents Public Domain. The document also notes that all items are provided without any warranty.
